THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAIGHT ASHBURY MUSIC CENTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE ROSS GROUP AKA THE ROSS GROUP, INC. MIDDLEBROOKS, ALBERT ROSS, ELBERT $3,067.49 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,157.49, ELBERT ROSS IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
